join_order.notes: Pre-built sub_adsh_hash used — zero build cost (P11). After hash probe, check sub_fy[sub_row]==2022 inline. Only ~16,882 sub rows pass fy=2022.

filters.notes: Resolve usd_code at startup by scanning uom_dict.txt; filter int16_t dict code
NaN sentinel check — apply together with uom filter in same branch
Applied inline post-probe; INT32_MIN sentinel must NOT match

dual_aggregation.description: Single pass over num accumulates BOTH subquery (per-cik) and main (per name_code,cik) simultaneously — avoids double scan of 39M-row fact table (P4)

subquery_agg.purpose: Compute AVG(SUM(value) per cik) threshold T

main_agg.purpose: SUM(value) per (name, cik) for HAVING + output
main_agg.notes: 64 threads x 32768 slots x 16B = 32MB < 44MB L3; key packs both GROUP BY dims (C15)

data_structures.sub_adsh_index: pre-built mmap hash index (sub_adsh_hash.bin); 262144 slots x 16B = 4MB; fully cache-resident during scan
data_structures.cik_agg_map: thread-local open-addressing hash map; cap=16384; key=int32_t cik; val=int64_t sum_cents; empty sentinel key=INT32_MIN via std::fill (C20)
data_structures.name_cik_agg_map: thread-local open-addressing hash map; cap=32768; key=uint64_t packed (name_code<<32|cik); val=int64_t sum_cents; empty sentinel=UINT64_MAX via std::fill (C20)
data_structures.aggregation_merge: sequential merge of thread-local maps post-scan; low group count (8K+16K) makes this fast

decimal_accumulation.method: int64_t cents: iv = llround(v * 100.0); sum_cents += iv
decimal_accumulation.rationale: num.value max ~1.88e17; double has ~15.95 sig digits; accumulation causes +-0.01 mismatches at values >= 1e13

parallelism.notes: Each thread owns local cik_agg + name_cik_agg; merge sequentially after parallel scan completes; merge cost negligible at 8K+16K groups

indexes.layout: [uint32_t cap=262144][SubADSHSlot x 262144]; slot={int32_t adsh_code, int32_t row_id, int32_t _pad0, int32_t _pad1}

output.tiebreaker: cik ASC — stable unique secondary key to prevent non-determinism (C33)
output.sort_method: std::partial_sort on result vector after HAVING filter (P6)
output.string_quoting: C31: always double-quote name column — printf("\"%s\"", name_dict[name_code].c_str())

correctness_rules_applied.C9: Hash table capacity = next_power_of_2(group_count * 2); sized on FILTERED group cardinality (P23)
correctness_rules_applied.C15: Main agg key includes BOTH GROUP BY dims: name_code AND cik packed as uint64_t
correctness_rules_applied.C20: Use std::fill for sentinel initialization — never memset for multi-byte sentinels
correctness_rules_applied.C24: All hash probes use bounded for-loop (probe < cap), not unbounded while
correctness_rules_applied.C29: HARD CONSTRAINT: int64_t cents accumulation; no double/Kahan accumulators
correctness_rules_applied.C31: Double-quote all string/dict output columns in CSV
correctness_rules_applied.C32: Pre-built index header parse (cap, mask, ht pointer) declared at function scope before any loop
correctness_rules_applied.C33: Stable tiebreaker cik ASC appended to ORDER BY comparator
